title: Home Screen - Device is up to date - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Home Screen shows "Device is up to date" status with battery levels and software version when both earbuds are connected
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Ensure both earbuds are connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
4. Check the Status Box on the Home screen.
5. Tap the Status Box to expand it.
6. Observe the expanded Status Box details.
expected: 1. Home screen displays "Device is up to date" status. 2. Status Box shows battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds with green indicators. 3. Status Box shows a "connected" status with a green indicator. 4. Status Box displays a device image showing both earbuds. 5. Tapping the Status Box reveals a "Software" field with the software version and a green indicator.
